purpose: Track conflicting information across official and unofficial specs so the digital twin is built to actual 2019 F-450 parameters, not generic Super Duty specs.

unresolved_conflicts.description: Unresolved exact-vehicle question: does 2019 F-450 Chassis Cab Regular Cab 4x2 DRW 145.3/60 use a non-driving solid beam/monobeam front axle, or Twin-I-Beam (or another architecture)? No architectural decision has been reached.

contradicting_sources.claim: Front Suspension: Twin-I-Beam Independent Coil Spring (4x2) — third-party aggregator text
contradicting_sources.notes: Not bound to hashed OEM pages for this silo.

contradicting_sources.source_name: Ford BBAS / Chassis Cab specifications (hunt target CAND-FORD-BBAS-2019)
contradicting_sources.claim: OEM may document a wide-track monobeam / solid non-driving axle for heavy F-450 chassis cabs — UNVERIFIED until local bytes + page extract exist
contradicting_sources.notes: Do not treat as AUTHORITATIVE. Prior DOCUMENT_SUPPORTED-style citations voided (file absent).

contradicting_sources.source_name: Ford F-Super Duty Service Manual (hunt target CAND-FORD-SM-2019)
contradicting_sources.claim: Service procedures may cover 4x2 and 4x4 — architecture claim NOT_EXECUTED
contradicting_sources.notes: High cross-contamination risk if 4x4 driven-beam pages are applied to 4x2.

unresolved_conflicts.mitigation_reconciliation: DT-D037/D038 · RL-006/007: PRIMARY_SOURCE_REQUIRED + Hard Rule 13. Architecture = RESEARCH_REQUIRED. SRC-CAND-000001/2/3 NOT_ACQUIRED. RC scores are hunt priority only. No geometry extraction. VIN-filtered parts match required before CONFIGURATION_MATCH. Do not inherit 4x4 or 169.3 in WB mounts.

unresolved_conflicts.description: Standard Ford fleet order guides list tires as standard 225/70R19.5G tires, but the actual tire brand (e.g., Continental, Michelin, Goodyear) can vary by factory batch and trim choice.
unresolved_conflicts.mitigation_reconciliation: Factory tire size is modeled generically as 225/70R19.5 only when separately evidenced. Continental Hybrid HS3 is noted as reference-vehicle-specific and must be verified by sidewall inspection.
